description_long: This house features a rectangular brick exterior with a flat roof and large, vertically oriented windows on multiple sides. The rear section includes a glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory that opens onto a small patio area, bordered by greenery. The main structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor set back from the sunroom extension. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped in vertical strips and others as single panes. The entryway is located on the side, marked by a large arched window and a simple, understated door. The overall design is modern-industrial, with clean lines, exposed brick, and minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a glass sunroom extension opening onto a patio. The design is modern-industrial with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: This view shows the narrow side of the house with two sets of tall, vertical windows and a partial view of the interior layout.
description_view_1: The long brick wall dominates this side, with a single window and the glass sunroom extension and patio visible to the right.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the glass-enclosed sunroom, patio area, and a large window above, with some outdoor furniture visible.
description_view_3: This side features a mix of tall windows, a large arched window, and the main entryway, as well as the sunroom and patio extension.
attribute_entryway_design: Side entry with a large arched window, simple door, and no porch or decorative overhang
